name: Okta Admin Role Assignments Without MFA
description: Detects active users with specific Okta admin role assignments who are not enrolled in MFA.
query: SELECT r.user_id AS id, COALESCE(u.login, r.user_login, r.user_id) AS account_name, r.role_type, r.role_label FROM okta_admin_roles r LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, 'active')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND COALESCE(u.mfa_enrolled, false) = false
remediation: Require MFA enrollment for every user assigned an Okta admin role before allowing privileged actions.
